title: boechera goodrichii
intro: Boechera goodrichii, also known as Goodrich's rockcress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is native to the western United States and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Boechera goodrichii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Boechera goodrichii can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
